locations.name: Jadena City

vehicles.name: West Boulevard
vehicles.description: Check the main west road for city exits.

vehicles.name: Market Road
vehicles.description: Good pickup after looting market-side buildings.

loot.notes: High loot density with many vertical angles.

locations.description: Large urban hot drop with intense building fights.

locations.name: Stadium

vehicles.name: North Parking
vehicles.description: Vehicle check after clearing the stadium bowl.

vehicles.name: East Road
vehicles.description: Backup route for rotations toward Jadena City.

loot.notes: Open center is dangerous once multiple teams have scopes.

locations.description: Landmark drop with strong loot and exposed rotations.

locations.name: Rin Jiang

vehicles.name: River Road
vehicles.description: Road spawns along the river edge.

vehicles.name: North Shops

loot.notes: Strong mid-map control if you secure bridge vision.

locations.description: River city with bridge control and layered buildings.

locations.name: Yu Lin

vehicles.name: South Road
vehicles.description: Primary rotation line for safer edge play.

loot.notes: Good controlled start if the plane path misses Jadena.

locations.description: Town with solid loot and calmer early fights.

locations.name: Neox Factory

vehicles.name: Factory Gate
vehicles.description: Vehicle line near the main gate.

loot.notes: Industrial cover gives good reset options after first contact.

locations.description: Factory complex with strong loot and many hard-cover fights.

secret_rooms.name: Rondo Secured Room

secret_rooms.loot: High-tier weapons, armor, utility, and attachments.
secret_rooms.notes: Rondo systems may change by patch; update this dataset after game updates.
